c71860c77-DNv5VYLZ.js: "允许用户添加 MCP 服务器"
__claude_zh_cn_hardcoded_ui__.js: "Font for the Claude Code interface — menus, sidebar, and chat."
"Claude Code 界面字体，用于菜单、侧边栏和聊天。"
"Set a custom monospace font for code and terminal."
"为代码和终端设置自定义等宽字体。"
"Automatically connect new local sessions to Remote Control so you can continue them from the CLI or claude.ai/code."
"自动将新的本地会话连接到远程控制，以便你可以从 CLI 或 claude.ai/code 继续使用。"
"When Claude pushes changes to a branch, it automatically opens a pull request without asking first. Applies to remote sessions only."
"Claude 将更改推送到分支时，会自动打开拉取请求，而不会先询问。仅适用于远程会话。"
"Shown in the model picker. Leave blank to auto-format from the ID."
"显示在模型选择器中。留空将根据 ID 自动格式化。"
"Enable the Cowork tab. Claude works on longer tasks like research, analysis, and documents."
"启用 Cowork 标签页。Claude 可处理研究、分析和文档等长任务。"
"Enable the Code tab. Claude writes and runs code."
"启用 Code 标签页。Claude 可编写并运行代码。"
"These apply regardless of which surfaces are enabled."
"无论启用哪些功能界面，这些限制都会生效。"
"Hostnames the agent's tools may reach from the Cowork and Code tabs. Also surfaced under Egress Requirements."
"Agent 工具可从 Cowork 和 Code 标签页访问的主机名。也会显示在出口要求中。"
"Applies to both the Cowork and Code tabs."
"同时适用于 Cowork 和 Code 标签页。"
Applies to both the Cowork and Code tabs.
同时适用于 Cowork 和 Code 标签页。
"Only affects **tool calls**. Inference and MCP traffic are covered by their own allowlists elsewhere."
"仅影响 **工具调用**。推理和 MCP 流量由其他位置的允许列表控制。"
Only affects **tool calls**. Inference and MCP traffic are covered by their own allowlists elsewhere.
仅影响 **工具调用**。推理和 MCP 流量由其他位置的允许列表控制。
"When unset, only the inference endpoint is reachable from the sandbox; the agent's package installs (pip/npm) and web fetches will fail with a 403."
"未设置时，沙盒只能访问推理端点；Agent 的包安装（pip/npm）和网页抓取将因 403 失败。"
When unset, only the inference endpoint is reachable from the sandbox; the agent's package installs (pip/npm) and web fetches will fail with a 403.
未设置时，沙盒只能访问推理端点；Agent 的包安装（pip/npm）和网页抓取将因 403 失败。
"Accepts exact hostnames (`api.github.com`), wildcards (`*.corp.com` matches one subdomain level), and `*` to allow all."
"接受精确主机名（`api.github.com`）、通配符（`*.corp.com` 匹配一级子域）和 `*`（允许全部）。"
Accepts exact hostnames (`api.github.com`), wildcards (`*.corp.com` matches one subdomain level), and `*` to allow all.
接受精确主机名（`api.github.com`）、通配符（`*.corp.com` 匹配一级子域）和 `*`（允许全部）。
"Wildcards don't cross schemes. `*.corp.com` matches `docs.corp.com` but not `corp.com` itself; add both if you need the apex."
"通配符不跨越层级。`*.corp.com` 匹配 `docs.corp.com`，不匹配 `corp.com` 本身；需要顶级域时请同时添加两者。"
Wildcards don't cross schemes. `*.corp.com` matches `docs.corp.com` but not `corp.com` itself; add both if you need the apex.
通配符不跨越层级。`*.corp.com` 匹配 `docs.corp.com`，不匹配 `corp.com` 本身；需要顶级域时请同时添加两者。
"IP literals and localhost always resolve regardless of this list; this is a public-egress filter, not a sandbox."
"IP 字面量和 localhost 始终可解析，不受此列表影响；这是公共出站过滤器，不是沙盒。"
IP literals and localhost always resolve regardless of this list; this is a public-egress filter, not a sandbox.
IP 字面量和 localhost 始终可解析，不受此列表影响；这是公共出站过滤器，不是沙盒。
"Hosts you add here also need to be open on your network firewall. See Egress Requirements for the full allowlist."
"你在此添加的主机也需在网络防火墙上开放。完整允许列表请查看出口要求。"
Hosts you add here also need to be open on your network firewall. See Egress Requirements for the full allowlist.
你在此添加的主机也需在网络防火墙上开放。完整允许列表请查看出口要求。
"This configuration has changes that haven't been saved. They will be lost."
"此配置有未保存的更改。这些更改将丢失。"
"Use a darker, near-black background when dark mode is on."
"深色模式开启时使用更深、接近纯黑的背景。"
"Let Claude run multiple agents in parallel for complex tasks. Workflows can use a lot of your usage limit quickly."
"允许 Claude 为复杂任务并行运行多个 Agent。工作流可能很快消耗你的使用额度。"
"Dynamic workflows run many subagents in parallel and can use a lot of your usage limit. Stop them any time from the <link>tasks panel</link>."
"动态工作流会并行运行多个子 Agent，并可能消耗大量使用额度。你可随时从<link>任务面板</link>停止它们。"
"Dynamic workflows are disabled by your organization's policy."
"动态工作流已被你的组织策略禁用。"
"Your artifacts and scheduled tasks are stored at {path}."
"你的工件和计划任务存储在 {path}。"
"Copy files to {location} and restart the app. Your existing files will remain in {previousLocation}."
"将文件复制到 {location} 并重启应用。你的现有文件将保留在 {previousLocation}。"
"Your connection works, but the provider rejected a test request. Often a model-access or quota issue."
"连接正常，但提供商拒绝了测试请求。这通常是模型访问权限或配额问题。"
"Connectors have moved to Customize. Head there to browse, connect, and manage them."
"连接器已移至“自定义”。前往那里浏览、连接和管理连接器。"
Connectors have moved to Customize. Head there to browse, connect, and manage them.
连接器已移至“自定义”。前往那里浏览、连接和管理连接器。
"Connectors have moved to <link>Customize</link>. Head there to browse, connect, and manage them."
"连接器已移至<link>自定义</link>。前往那里浏览、连接和管理连接器。"
"Generate code, documents, and designs in a dedicated window alongside your conversation."
"在对话旁的专用窗口中生成代码、文档和设计。"
Generate code, documents, and designs in a dedicated window alongside your conversation.
在对话旁的专用窗口中生成代码、文档和设计。
"Create dynamic artifacts that stay up-to-date using live data from your connectors."
"使用来自连接器的实时数据，创建保持更新的动态工件。"
Create dynamic artifacts that stay up-to-date using live data from your connectors.
使用来自连接器的实时数据，创建保持更新的动态工件。
"Create dynamic artifacts that stay up-to-date using live data from <link>your connectors</link>."
"使用来自<link>你的连接器</link>的实时数据，创建保持更新的动态工件。"

"Claude 会在聊天和 Cowork 中记住这些内容，并遵循<aupLink>Anthropic 的指南</aupLink>。<learnMoreLink>了解更多</learnMoreLink>"

"Your gateway couldn't serve {model}. This model may not be configured on your gateway, or access may be restricted."
"第三方无法提供 {model}。该模型可能未在第三方配置，或访问受限。"
"Your gateway couldn’t serve {model}. This model may not be configured on your gateway, or access may be restricted."
"第三方无法提供 {model}。该模型可能未在第三方配置，或访问受限。"
"Optional HTTPS URL. The banner text becomes a link when set."
"可选 HTTPS URL。设置后，横幅文本会变成链接。"
"Single line, truncated on overflow. Maximum 200 characters."
"单行显示，溢出时截断。最多 200 个字符。"
"Six-digit hex (#RRGGBB). Applied exactly as configured; not theme-adapted."
"六位十六进制颜色（#RRGGBB）。将完全按配置应用，不会适配主题。"
"Lock the approval state for specific tools. Unlisted tools stay user-controlled."
"锁定特定工具的审批状态。未列出的工具仍由用户控制。"
"Hi, I'm Claude. How can I help you today?"
"你好，我是 Claude。今天我能帮你什么？"

"禁用 claude:// 深度链接处理"
"Get notified when Claude has finished a response. Useful for long-running tasks."
"Claude 完成回复时接收通知。对长时间运行的任务很有用。"

"You’re running Claude through your organization’s own inference provider (cc.freemodel.dev). Your conversations are sent there, not to Anthropic, and are governed by your organization’s agreement with that provider."
"你正在通过组织自己的推理提供方 (cc.freemodel.dev) 运行 Claude。你的对话会发送到该提供方，而不是 Anthropic，并受你的组织与该提供方之间协议的约束。"

You’re running Claude through your organization’s own inference provider (cc.freemodel.dev). Your conversations are sent there, not to Anthropic, and are governed by your organization’s agreement with that provider.
你正在通过组织自己的推理提供方 (cc.freemodel.dev) 运行 Claude。你的对话会发送到该提供方，而不是 Anthropic，并受你的组织与该提供方之间协议的约束。
"Your prompts, Claude’s responses, or any conversation content"
"你的提示、Claude 的回复或任何对话内容"
"你的文件、代码或工作区内容"
"What Anthropic may receive (configured by your organization)"
"Anthropic 可能收到的内容（由你的组织配置）"
"Crash reports and error diagnostics, so we can fix bugs"
"崩溃报告和错误诊断，用于修复问题"
"Anonymous usage metrics including usage counts (not conversation content)"
"包含使用次数的匿名使用指标（不包含对话内容）"
"Update-check requests, so the app can stay current"
"更新检查请求，用于保持应用为最新版本"
"A diagnostic report, only if you explicitly choose “Send to Anthropic”"
"诊断报告，仅当你明确选择“发送给 Anthropic”时才会发送"
"Run tasks on a schedule or whenever you need them. Type /schedule in any existing task to set one up."
"按计划或在需要时运行任务。在任何现有任务中输入 /schedule 即可设置。"
